pattern: Union-Find: count connected components; number of moves needed equals components minus one, when cables are sufficient.
hints: Count the number of connected components using Union-Find or BFS/DFS; call it C.
You need at least n-1 cables total to connect n nodes; if connections < n-1, return -1.
With enough cables, C-1 moves (cable relocations) always suffice to merge C components into one.
